woman: 女性 / an adult female person
wood: 木材、森 / the material of trees; a small forest
writer: 作家、書き手 / a person who writes
wrong: 間違った、悪い / not correct; bad
yesterday: 昨日 / the day before today
youth: 若さ、青年期、若者 / being young; a young person
